PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.ANIMATION_DIRECTION_HINT: Direction of the rotation animation. 'None' removes the rotation.
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.ANIMATION_DURATION_HINT: Duration of the rotation animation (e.g. '3s' or '500ms').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.IMAGE_HEIGHT_HINT: Height of the pause icon (e.g. '150px' or '8rem').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.IMAGE_WIDTH_HINT: Width of the pause icon (e.g. '150px' or '8rem').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.OPACITY_HINT: Opacity of the pause icon (between 0 and 1).
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.IMAGE_MARGIN_TOP_HINT: Vertical offset of the pause icon (e.g. '50px' or '-2rem').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_TEXT_MARGIN_TOP_HINT: Vertical offset of the pause text (e.g. '20px' or '-1rem').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_BACKGROUND_HINT: CSS background value (e.g. 'none', a color, or a gradient).
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_BACKGROUND_IMAGE_HINT: Background image of the pause overlay.
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_TEXT_HINT: Text shown on the pause overlay.
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_TEXT_FONT_SIZE_HINT: Font size of the pause text (e.g. '2rem' or '32px').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.PAUSE_TEXT_LETTER_SPACING_HINT: Letter spacing of the pause text (e.g. '0.3em' or '2px').
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.RESET_DEFAULTS_DONE: Pause Customizer settings reset to defaults.
PAUSE_CUSTOMIZER.SELECT_IMAGE_HINT: Image used as the pause icon. Use the folder button to select a folder for random images.
